data.body:
Investigation complete. All field sync gaps identified and fixed:

OUTBOUND FIXES (local → Jira):
1. AcliClient.create_issue() now sends description, priority, assignee (was only title+type)
2. process_outbound() now handles EDIT events for title, priority, assignee, description
3. Priority converts local int (0-4) → Jira name (Highest/High/Medium/Low/Lowest)

INBOUND FIXES (Jira → local):
1. write_create_events() maps Jira fields to local schema (ticket_type, title, description, priority, assignee)
2. process_inbound() writes EDIT events when Jira fields differ from local compiled state
3. Priority converts Jira name → local int (0-4)
4. Description changes now detected and synced

Test coverage: 46 field-coverage tests (all passing), 81 existing bridge tests (no regressions), 127 total.
